content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.64%, Bank Nifty -1.04%, India VIX +3.37% to 17.18 — risk-off undertone with breadth weak across financials/energy. However, IT (+0.77%) and pockets of Capital Goods, Pharma, Specialty Chem are running hot on Q4 catalysts. With deployment already at 58% across 12 names and book up +1.35% today, focus is locking gains via SL trails on winners, not chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +10.6% with strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%) and AAA-rating catalyst. SL 1066.24 already locks ~8.4% profit (well above breakeven) and sits ~2% below CMP 1088 — within trail-gap discipline. Target 1135 is ~4.3% upside, near 52w high 1141.90. No-op MODIFY: keeping levels as-is since SL already trails appropriately. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing SL 1066.24 already locks +8.4% profit, ~2% below CMP 1088 — appropriate trail gap. Target 1135 intact. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6%, gold rebounding +1.86% intraday on VIX spike + risk-off. SL 121 (~2.7% below CMP 124.43) appropriate as defensive position. Hold for safe-haven hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9% post strong Q4 (revenue +22%, PAT +14%). SL 812 sits ~1.9% below CMP 827.60 — already at near-breakeven. Target 870 (5.1% upside) intact. Trail gap appropriate; do not tighten further (would force exit on noise)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +8.2% on +16.4% earnings explosion to 1360. SL 1338.68 already locks +6.3% profit, sits ~1.6% below CMP — within 1% trail-gap floor. Target 1450 (+6.6%) intact. Existing levels are well-calibrated; emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3% with strong FY26 (PAT +41.8%). SL 2960 (~3.4% below CMP 3073.70) appropriate; target 3225 intact. Defense sector momentum continues. Will trail when P&L clears +4%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.1%. SL 832 sits 0.8% below CMP 840.15 — TIGHT (below 1% trail-gap floor per Rule 12c). Should NOT have been set this tight. However, raising to anywhere higher would breach SL>CMP. Holding existing SL; if normal noise stops it out, that is the cost of the prior tight placement. Target 875 intact (+4.1% upside)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7% but Q4 strong (PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310 bps). SL 1445 (~2.4% below CMP 1481) intact; thesis intact. Hold to SL or target 1575."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -3.6%, CMP 2366.20 vs SL 2370 — SL essentially AT CMP, intraday wobble post-Q4 (PAT +87.5%, EBITDA margin 33.6%, $337M USFDA approval) and ahead of May 8 earnings call. Per Rule 17, do NOT preemptively exit; respect the SL. Q4 was a blockbuster beat — wobble is reaction-day noise, not thesis break. If SL fires, accept the controlled loss; if it bounces (likely given fundamentals), recovery is preserved."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5% intraday consolidation after strong Q4 (PAT +317% YoY) and 4-session +19.5% breakout. SL 1580 (~1.9% below CMP 1610.90) appropriate. Target 1740 intact. Hold for breakout continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.1%. Q4 strong (PAT +11%, FY26 PAT +47%). SL 2740 (~1.6% below CMP 2784) appropriate. Target 2920 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%. SL 9000 (~1.4% below CMP 9127) appropriate. Target 9550 (+4.6%) intact. Record Q4 revenue +27%, dividend Rs 47/share — momentum strong but PAT +7% lag is a flag."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6% intraday but stock printed 52w high 2044 today on Q4 (revenue +17.5%, Defence +46.4%, order book Rs 10,961 cr). SL 1955 (~2.4% below CMP 2001.90) appropriate. Target 2110 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 placed 3354 minutes ago (yesterday). Per timing rules MIS expires intraday, so this should already be canceled by engine. If still working, it is safely outside today's plan. Not stacking another order."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1066.24, "reasoning": "SL locks +8.4% profit at 2% below CMP, well-calibrated. Target 1135 near 52w high."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL appropriate amid VIX +3.37% spike."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 812.00, "reasoning": "SL near breakeven, post-Q4 strength continuing."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1338.68, "reasoning": "SL locks +6.3% profit; trail gap 1.6% within discipline."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2960.00, "reasoning": "Defense order book strong; SL 3.4% below CMP appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 832.00, "reasoning": "SL slightly tight (0.8% gap); cannot tighten further without breaching SL>CMP. Accept prior placement."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1445.00, "reasoning": "Q4 beat strong, modest red still within SL absorption."},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2370.00, "reasoning": "At SL on Q4 wobble — respect SL per Rule 17, do NOT preempt. Fundamentals (PAT +87.5%) intact; concall May 8 may catalyze rebound."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Breakout consolidation; SL 1.9% below CMP appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2740.00, "reasoning": "Specialty chem Q4 strong; SL 1.6% below CMP appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 9000.00, "reasoning": "ATH momentum; SL 1.4% below CMP appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1955.00, "reasoning": "52w high today on Defence +46% Q4; SL 2.4% below CMP appropriate."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Per Rule 18, walking through qualifying BULLISH watchlist names with explicit reject rationale: (1) THERMAX (+0.08, +14% today on Q4) — REJECT: extended +14% on the day, 28%+ above SMA20, chase risk into BBand upper. (2) GABRIEL (+0.12) — REJECT: Q4 results May 13 (3 sessions away) = binary event per Rule 11; do not open new pre-event without event-trade sizing, and event-trade slot already not warranted. (3) DABUR/ASIANPAINT — REJECT: extended +6% post-Q4, no pullback. (4) BAJAJ-AUTO (+7% today) — REJECT: extended, no pullback structure. (5) PERSISTENT — REJECT: cluster — already heavy in COFORGE on IT. (6) INDUSINDBK — REJECT per Rule 13: SFIO/SEBI overhang not definitively cleared since Day-5 round-trip. (7) TATATECH — REJECT: catalyst behind 12.8x volume unverified, no fundamental edge. (8) APOLLOTYRE/KPIL/RAMCOCEM/NH/ABCAPITAL — neutral modifiers, no edge over existing book. Net: book already at 58% deployed across 12 names with VIX rising; admitting another extended breakout into a -0.64% Nifty/+3.4% VIX tape would be cluster-stacking on the same Q4-results theme that already drove most existing positions. The fact-based risk-off case (VIX spike, breadth weak, FII flat) supports the no-admit stance today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Strong day with realized +3.5K and unrealized +10.2K on a tape down 0.6%. Book is heavily concentrated in Q4-results-momentum names (PNBHOUSING, COFORGE, MARICO, WOCKPHARMA, BHARATFORG, LUPIN all post-Q4 reactive). Discipline today is to lock these gains via existing SLs, not add more correlated catalyst names. CAMS SL gap (0.8%) is sub-optimal but cannot be widened (would loosen SL — guardrail rejects). Lupin at SL is the key risk: respecting it per Rule 17 lessons learned on Day-12. Cash buffer 42% maintains optionality for tomorrow's setups."
}
